ops.text: Approved plan (plans/i-also-recorded-snazzy-salamander.md): Part A = fleet-wide plugin.json auto-bump CI (reusable workflow @plugin-v1 in cc-skills; bump lane for cache-only plugins, guard lane for binary-pinned codex/cc-context/cc-review/cc-present/cc-runtime + release-synced captain-hook).
